feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Treasury Management_Public cloud_Change logs
entry.content:
How to find the financial transaction change logs in treasurey management.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage Automatic Payments Error
entry.content:
The app "Manage Automatic Payments" outputs multiple errors. Tell me the cause.

Internal error when calling POSTING_INTERFACE_CLEARING.

entry.title: About setting up Define Accounts for Bank Charges
entry.content:
This is a requirement for Japan. I want to implement "Define Accounts for Bank Charges" in the Help Portal. However, in reality, "Charges Debited to Payee Company Code" is not created with automatic payment. I would like to know the reason.

CBC 102624 and 104063 have already been set.

Help portal>Define Accounts for Bank Charges

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b8c08e0197454541a11f8d46ef1ab96e/748b21ec30c044789a51f151e29b6bd0.html

entry.title: how can we display structure of the functional location and equipments in SAP asset management ?
entry.content:
Hello,

i have a business need, the requirment is to find a way to display all functional locations and equipment in a structural way like the one in the transaction IH01 in SAP S4HANA on premise as shown in the screenshot  below : 

is there any app we could use on SAP public cloud ?

 

thanks in advance.

entry.title: Mutiple Warning message for field check
entry.content:
Hello All,

Reference to subjected issue we need your expertise help, for our client at outbound delivery we already have implemented custom logic for check custom field and selected as an "I' information if field is missing before saving the delivery at both create and change mode and it's working perfectly fine.

For fulfill our client requirement we need to implement one more custom logic in same outbound delivery business Badi but after implementing we are able see only one error message at one time. if both fields also missing system showing only one error.

So is there any code logic available so we able see both missing field error and warning message same time that we implemented in business logic  

Please share your input it will really be helpful for us. 

Thanks 

Samadhan

entry.title: The field Product Hierarchy (MARA-PRDHA) does not appear in transaction MM01, MM02 or MM03
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I have requirement to do classification of MRO materials in Product Hierarchy.
For a test I have maintained the root node and sub node and assign FERT material to the PH.

 


But no material shows PRDHA field in general data not even the one for which I have assigned the PH.

I have checked config "Maintain Field Selection for Data Screens"
You can see for FERT it is optional entry

The 2nd problem is material type ERSA (Spare) is not in field ref list.

Can anyone please suggest how can I see the PRDHA fiel in general data.

entry.title: SAP Screen Personas on Public Cloud: Search help problem when move custom fields to header in VA02
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have some custom fields on VA02 screen. Some of the custom fields need to be in header part of the screen. I moved them with screen personas as shown below.

We can see values when custom fields were filled elsewhere. So far everything has worked smoothly. Until we want to change them values with using F4 in VA02 screen. If F4 is used while on a tab outside the custom fields, we see same F4 screen both custom fields in the header part. If F4 is used in the custom fields tab, there is no problem about custom fields.

After that I tried to write a script for the second custom field in the header part. I used it onF4 event of the custom field. The script is as shown below.

if (session.findById('wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM').selectedTab.id == 'wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14') {
session
.findById(
'wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4332/subCFD_SCREEN:SAPLCFD_SAP_GUI:1000/subSUBSCREEN_5:SAPLCFD_SAP_GUI:2074/ctxtGS_SAP_GUI_UI_FIELDS-ASSOCIATION_FIELD_VALUE',
)
.setFocus();

session.findById('wnd[0]').sendVKey(4);
} else {

session.findById('wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14').select();
session.findById('wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14').executeWebRequest('post', 'proxy', 'assert/tabswitch', null, null);
session
.findById(
'wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4332/subCFD_SCREEN:SAPLCFD_SAP_GUI:1000/subSUBSCREEN_5:SAPLCFD_SAP_GUI:2074/ctxtGS_SAP_GUI_UI_FIELDS-ASSOCIATION_FIELD_VALUE',
)
.setFocus();
session.findById('wnd[0]').sendVKey(4);
}

When I execute the script in the script editor, everything is fine. There is no dump or error. I assigned the script to second custom field. After that I press the F4. Nothing about F4 opens on first use. On the second use, it gives an error as follows.

Choosing "Redraw the screen" is showing the F4 screen. After that error everything is working correctly. Opening F4 on each tab works properly.

Is there any solution for that problem with script or without script? Or is there a step I'm doing wrong?

Thanks in advance for any input.

Berk.

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Data Migration Cockpit Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created few custom fields for a customer's (Key User Extensibility Fields). We are in the stage of migrating their legacy system data into SAP.

There is a data migration template called (Source data for Customer - extend existing record by new org levels) where it has the custom fields I have created in the system. But whatever the value I put in the template and migration is also getting successful, but somehow couldn't see the value getting reflected on the customer master data records.

Please advise what could be wrong in here.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Please refer to the below screenshot

 

Thanks!

entry.title: valuated stock in transit for scope item BDN
entry.content: Currently sell from valuated stock (scope item 5MQ) is available for sell from stock. I asked to activate valuated stock in transit for bought in items (Scope item BDN).  The expert configuration should add sales doc type OR and item category CBAB. I got back this is not possible from SAP. The only difference with regular sell from stock is that an item is bought in for a certain sales order. As soon as the sales order is delivered DAP to a customer with a certain distance we want to keep it valuated stock in transit.  Why is this not possible?

entry.title: Possibility to influence VAT and CIT exchange rate dates in Poland - S4/HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Public Cloud customer in Poland wants to have the same date for the exchange rates in both VAT and CIT taxes which reflect the sales date. SAP has implemented a note: 3344638 - Requirement to distinguish between CIT and VAT exchange rate - Poland - SAP for Me due to the legal requirement. According to Polish law you can choose to have the same exchange rates for both taxes (as long as you proceed with this for at least 12 months – then it will be assumed as your way of working and accepted by authorities).

Right now they have to different dates. For the VAT purpose system is taking Sales Date (e.g. 30.04.2024) but for the CIT - Billing Date (e.g. 15.05.2024). In the note you can find the statement: Here are the same rates, but can differ depending if the Exchange Rate according to VATDATE is different than the one in header Translation Date.

My question is then: is there any possibility to influence the date taken for the exchange rates (VAT and CIT) in Public Cloud (except changing the billing date!), as I cannot find it in the customizing.

entry.title: custom logic app need use function Module Read_text
entry.content:
I need read Log Text in Financial Document Item but sentence CALL Function Read_text do not work, I tried using class cf_reca_text but the class is not accepted.

What other option can use? I dont Find CDS to get Long Text from item in FI document.

 

regards.

entry.title: About Business Partner Supplier Company and Customer Company Credit Memo Payment Terms
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I used OData V2 API: Business Partner (A2X) to do the Create or Update the Business Partner Data

We want to set the [Credit Memo Payment Terms] same with [Payment Terms]

But in this API it has not this [Credit Memo Payment Terms] Schema

Can I ask for, If I set the Schema [Payment Terms] but I have not set the [Credit Memo Payment Terms]

Will there be any impact? Or can I have some [Credit Memo Payment Terms] information to know what does this Schema do?

entry.title: Regarding Unable to Activate with error messages in 'Manage Contract' App
entry.content:
I am writing to inquire about the inability to activate in the 'Manage Contract' app.

While attempting to create and activate a contract using the Manage Contract app, we encountered the following error, preventing successful activation:

" Activation is not possible due to warnings(Posting Term) "

Is this error message raised because of these remained option? (Contract Management APP)

Despite attempting to create the contract with the same details in test tenant, we are unable to determine the root cause of this issue.


I urgently inquire about an issue that needs to be resolved by the end of May.

Could you please provide insight into the cause of this error message? 

Additionally, if there are any steps we can take to resolve this issue, your advice would be greatly appreciated.  We are in great need of your assistance.

entry.title: Creating Kanban barcode EMPTY and FULL with [SAVE] public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I am seeking how I create a barcode with the action to [SAVE]

Something to do with prefix and suffix I suppose? But I do not know how or even if it's possible.

In the process to set the KANBAN container EMPTY/FULL

I create a barcode from 000000001[2] > Kanban ID 000000001 status 2 (EMPTY) > 0000000012

I create a barcode from 000000001[5] > Kanban ID 000000001 status 5 (FULL) > 0000000015

 

When scanning the specific barcode I still need the Button [SAVE] on the APP to Confirm the scanning and to execute the status by hand.

How do I create a barcode that includes the [SAVE] ?

Thank you in advance for your help 🙂

entry.title: Manage Mass Maintenance for custom fields in product master
entry.content:
Does the app Manage Mass Maintenance for Products cover custom fields in product master?

We have added custom fields in the product master on plant level. We would like to understand if all these will be possible to mass update in the app Manage Mass Maintenance for Product Master.

We are using SAP Public Cloud.

entry.title: Mass Reversals or Mass Void of checks in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi I'm trying to void a high number of checks.   With S4Hana Cloud I would use app Manage Outgoing Check to void them but this seems to only allow me to do it one at the time.  Is there another app I could use to void then in batch? Thanks, MC

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Cost estimate for sales order item
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We need to calculate cost estimate for sales order item in Public Cloud Edition system

How can we do that? We couldn't find any available Scop Item related with!

Thank you

entry.title: Actual Activity Price Calculation - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We did cost closing in our QA system, we noticed that in KSII; system calculated control code currency truly (Cost centers EUR amount / activity quantitiy) but second currency converted from end of the period exchange rate.

MY opinion: system have to calculate actual activity unit price in second currency from cost center amount. Exchange rate converter is not true. 

Does it work the same way on your system?

 

Thank you so much

entry.title: Partial Service Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hello All,

At a client they have a need to invoice a service order before all confirmations are completed (multiple invoices throughout the lifecycle of a service order).  In the starter system it is not allowing our team to do this, it only allows us to release for billing once a 'final confirmation' is completed.  Can anyone help point me in the right direction?

#servicemanagement

Thanks, JG

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Credit Management VKM4/VKM5 alternative solution?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

May I know alternative solutions for VKM4/VKM5 in SAP public cloud? Because in DCD (documented credit decision) not show blocked delivery.

We have business requirements for credit management, only credit block for delivery level not for sales order level.

Thanks.
